input: Add a WinterIllustration for a seasonal home screen variant — snow on the barn roof, bare trees, frozen pond
Update the CottageIllustration to add a wood pile stacked against the side wall
Update the GardenIllustration to add a trellis with climbing vines on the right side
Add a PantryIllustration showing shelves of preserved jars, root vegetables, and hanging dried herbs
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses basic rectangles and simple shapes but lacks the layered paper cut-out aesthetic with distinct depth planes. The shelves are flat horizontal bars without dimensional layering, and there are no background/mid-ground/foreground plane separations characteristic of paper cut-out style. The shapes feel more like a diagram than stacked paper layers.

COMPLETE_SCENE: The SVG code is truncated — the last element (shadow accent rect under shelf 1) is cut off mid-attribute, meaning the component does not render completely. Additionally, the second and third shelves lack jar/preserved item content, leaving large empty areas on the canvas unfilled.

input: Add a WorkshopIllustration — workbench, tools on pegboard, sawdust pile
